'''vachawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mboziite|mboziite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ch-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mboziite|mboziite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vachawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væchæwæth|væchæwæth]] || [[word:væchæwæj|væchæwæj]] || [[word:væchæwæsh|væchæwæsh]] || [[word:væchæwæ|væchæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vachachawath|vachachawath]] || [[word:vachachawaj|vachachawaj]] || [[word:vachachawash|vachachawash]] || [[word:vachachawa|vachachawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vachawath|vachawath]] || [[word:vachawaj|vachawaj]] || [[word:vachawash|vachawash]] || [[word:vachawa|vachawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vachafwath|vachafwath]] || [[word:vachafwaj|vachafwaj]] || [[word:vachafwash|vachafwash]] || [[word:vachafwaf|vachafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vachawatha|vachawatha]] || [[word:vachawaja|vachawaja]] || [[word:vachawasha|vachawasha]] || [[word:vachawaka|vachawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vachawath|vachawath]] || [[word:vachawaj|vachawaj]] || [[word:vachawash|vachawash]] || [[word:vachawa|vachawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vachawathal|vachawathal]] || [[word:vachawajal|vachawajal]] || [[word:vachawashal|vachawashal]] || [[word:vachawakal|vachawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vachawathatha|vachawathatha]] || [[word:vachawajaja|vachawajaja]] || [[word:vachawashasha|vachawashasha]] || [[word:vachawaka|vachawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vachawathan|vachawathan]] || [[word:vachawajan|vachawajan]] || [[word:vachawashan|vachawashan]] || [[word:vachawakan|vachawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vachawathaoro|vachawathaoro]] || [[word:vachawajaoro|vachawajaoro]] || [[word:vachawashaoro|vachawashaoro]] || [[word:vachawakaoro|vachawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
